item.title: This sub $5 nuclear stock could double, but it's risky, says Canaccord Genuity
item.description: This Italian company is poised to be a winner as nuclear energy becomes the answer to surging power demand, the firm said.

item.title: The 'Magnificent Seven' drove the stock market to record highs in recent years. Is the trade over?
item.description: Shares of all but two stocks in the "Mag 7" are in the red this year as worries mount about tech giants' soaring AI-fueled capex and earnings growth r...

item.title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on the growth potential of these three stocks
item.description: TipRanks names three stocks that analysts believe are set to perform well despite the recent market noise around AI disruption.

item.title: Berkshire was a net seller of stocks in Buffett's final quarter as CEO
item.description: During Warren Buffett's last quarter as CEO, Berkshire Hathaway sold more equities than it bought, continuing to whittle away at its big Apple and Ban...

item.title: This week’s most overbought stocks include Deere and Quanta Services
item.description: Investors piled into names like Deere and Quanta Services this week, sending the 14-day relative strength index for both names above 70.
